_note: Single source of design tokens for both platforms. COLORS are extracted faithfully from web/app/globals.css (authoritative). Web resolves these via the CSS vars + Tailwind teal ramp; iOS generates SwiftUI Color sets (light/dark) from them. Two themes, one per member: Cam = light, Graham = dark (web/lib/users.ts). Radii/type are read from components/ui.tsx; space mirrors Tailwind's 4px scale. Anything marked 'proposed' is not yet centralized in web — reconcile when iOS lands.

scales._note: Tailwind teal/red/emerald/amber ramps. dark = Tailwind v4 defaults; light = the overrides in globals.css (the teal ramp deliberately inverts so bright-on-dark text becomes deep ink on warm white).

roles._note: Semantic → scale key (resolve per active theme). Alpha noted where the app uses it.
roles.label: teal-200 @50% (uppercase, tracking-wider)

radius._note: card = rounded-2xl; pill = rounded-full. Other radii follow Tailwind defaults.

space._note: Tailwind 4px scale (p-5=20, gap-4=16, p-10=40 observed in components/ui.tsx).

type._note: iOS SF Pro (system) / web system-ui. Money and The Tape use tabular/monospaced digits (SwiftUI: .monospacedDigit()).
type.displayProposed: display(34) is for the splash/masthead — proposed; web masthead size not yet centralized.
